description_long: This is a single wooden bed with a dark brown, paneled frame featuring both a headboard and a footboard. The bed is topped with a thick, patterned comforter in shades of gray and white, along with a beige blanket draped across the middle. Two pillows, one gray and one white, are placed at the head of the bed, partially covered by the bedding. The frame has a sturdy, traditional design with square legs and visible wood grain texture. The bedding appears slightly disheveled, giving the bed a lived-in look. The overall appearance suggests a robust, utilitarian piece suitable for a residential or urban environment.
description: A dark wooden bed with a paneled frame, patterned comforter, and two pillows, featuring a traditional, sturdy design and a slightly messy arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the footboard, patterned comforter, and both pillows at the head of the bed.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the bed, the thickness of the mattress, and the layered bedding.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the headboard, the arrangement of the bedding, and the pillows tucked at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bed's length, the comforter draped over the side, and the exposed mattress.
